headline: Warning signs the US consumer is beginning to crack
summary: Consumers may be facing spending challenges in the coming months, according to Goldman Sachs' Ronnie Walker. Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma and B. Riley Wealth Chief Market Strategist Art Hogan join the Opening Bid panel to address whether the US consumer is weakening, especially amid rising gas prices (RB=F).
